rationale: Empirically drove the real binary (built from d327cdce) in /tmp scratch repos. `git show --name-only HEAD` = exactly the 5 declared files. `go test ./cmd/mindspec ./internal/panel ./internal/config ./internal/complete` all PASS incl. 112 pins (TestPanel_GateFieldDecisionInert, TestPanelVerbs_DecisionIsPanelGateDecision, TestPanelTally_ExitCodeTracksDecision). internal/instruct fails only the known pre-existing z4ps flake (TestRun_IdleNoBeads); all 40+ other instruct tests pass. AC3: `panel create --gate final_review` stamped panel.json with gate:final_review, expected_reviewers:12, approve_threshold:"10", matching `config show --gate final_review --json` exactly (vs global 6/n-1) — real per-gate mix config used. Invalid `--gate nonsense` and two control-byte variants (embedded \x01 and bare \a) all exited 1 with the 5-key recovery line BEFORE any write; before/after directory snapshots were byte-identical (no panel.json created). Omitting --gate: no `gate` key, and byte-for-byte identical (cmp+md5 match) to a binary built from the pre-bead-3 commit (08c7cbdf) run against the same repo state. Advisory read-through proven by mutating final_review's config after stamping: `config show` printed 'current config default is 10' (final_review's new total), not the global 6 — confirming the stamped gate drives ADVISORY selection while decision paths remain untouched. No second enum copy (grep clean); config-free leaf confirmed (go list -deps excludes internal/config).

findings.description: internal/instruct TestRun_IdleNoBeads fails identically on this commit and its parent — pre-existing z4ps flake per BRIEF, not attributable to this bead's diff. Not blocking.
Verified byte-identical-when-absent empirically via cmp/md5sum against a binary built from the immediate pre-bead-3 commit (08c7cbdf), not just JSON key inspection — stronger proof than a text diff.
